## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production milestone: 1M+ impressions achieved with 121 published articles](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Integration pages: 26 drafts, focusing on updating old templates and completing tier 3 articles](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Blog content: New topics being added, addressing quality issues (broken links, images)](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Comparison pages: Production begun, strategy for merging with existing content needed](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Milestone: Over 1 million impressions achieved](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [121 published articles to date](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Weekly performance: \~1,500 impressions (slight decrease from previous week)](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Individual article performance updated in the "performance" tab](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [26 drafts currently in the system](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [\~20 new drafts uploaded in the last two days](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [15 tier 3 articles remaining](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Action needed: Update old integration pages to new template format](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Note: Hosting provider pages require a different template approach](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Blog Content Strategy

  - [26 drafts in progress](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Theo working on publishing remaining drafts (3 left)](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [10 new topics added by Theo, currently being generated](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [40-50 more topics to be added by Andrej, focusing on valuable keyword difficulty and search volume](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Quality issues identified:](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
      - [Broken external links (404 errors)](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [Dated or missing content in linked resources](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Daniel working on fixing link issues and improving image generation](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Content Updates and Refreshes

  - [Plan to resume content enrichment and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Focus on low-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Exploring ways to add more value beyond just new content (e.g., gated content)](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Sydney to take charge of this effort from next week](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

### Comparison Pages

  - [Production begun for comparison pages (e.g., Directus, Payload, BarCMS, DataCMS)](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Need to determine strategy for merging with existing competitor-focused blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Options discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
    1.  Redirect existing content to new comparison pages
    2.  Add a "related article" component to link to existing blog posts

## Next Steps

  - [Paul: Create a template for hosting provider integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

  - [Andrej: Roll out remaining integration pages before handover](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Daniel: Complete link checking and image generation improvements this week](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Sydney: Develop comprehensive plan for updating low-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Victor & Andrej: Determine best strategy for merging comparison pages with existing competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Andrej: Handover to Sydney for next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/3j7KT_fGphNHXYdGDSsrENq2b28Zbwi_?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
